messages.content: Here's a bullet from my resume: "Owns pricing for 41 leisure properties across three US mountain regions, $214M annual room revenue." I'm applying for the Director of Revenue Strategy role at Sablewood Resorts Group — they want someone who's owned a seasonal pricing strategy end to end across a multi-property portfolio, comfortable writing their own SQL against Snowflake. Can you make it hit harder for this job?

Directs pricing for 41 leisure properties spanning three US mountain regions, driving $214M in annual room revenue — direct multi-property portfolio ownership, exactly what this director mandate calls for.

I'm tailoring my resume for the Director of Revenue Strategy opening at Sablewood Resorts Group. Scripted the extranet rate-loading workflow in Python, cutting a 6-hour weekly task to 40 minutes — proof this pricing logic won't wait around for a manual upload.
